name: wur_pmu_top
_note: Red-zone manifest for the WuR PMU. Identity + pin roles are REAL (designer-supplied): TB sim_1108_yusheng/sim_LDO; DUT Hi1108_WuR_PMU/WuR_PMU_TOP instantiated as PMU_TOP. Each port's 'pin' is the symbol PIN name; the '<net:PIN>' nets are RESOLVER-FILLED -- run Mode A in the live Virtuoso (or hand-edit the nets) to turn them into real TB nets. v_out 'iload' is pure metadata (recorded OP load current; the Zout probe is dc=0 AC-only so the TB load still sets the OP). i_out 'dc' is the pin's compliance/operating node voltage (the probe applies it).
